word: G2078 - ἔσχατος - éschatos - es'-khat-os - Ends of

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἔσχατος

- Transliteration: Eschatos

- Phonetic: es'-khat-os

- Definition:

1. extreme

a. last in time or in place

b. last in a series of places

c. last in a temporal succession

2. the last

a. last, referring to time

b. of space, the uttermost part, the end, of the earth

c. of rank, grade of worth, last i.e. lowest

- Origin: a superlative probably from G2192 (in the sense of contiguity)

- TDNT entry: 13:37,3

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: A superlative probably from G2192 (in the sense of contiguity); farthest final (of place or time): - ends of last latter end lowest uttermost.
